techme 0.1.2.9008
  • Reference
    • 02-Techme数据集
    • 机构信息库

Agricultural Mechanization Services by Region

Source: R/MachineService.R
MachineService.Rd

This dataset contains comprehensive statistics on agricultural mechanization services by region, including service organizations, personnel, investment, and output. The data is extracted from the China Agricultural Machinery Industry Yearbook, covering all provinces and regions in China.

Usage

MachineService

Format

A data frame:

province

character. Province name, including national total.

year

character. Year of the statistics.

chn_block4

character. Service indicator in Chinese (e.g., "Year-end Organizations", "Year-end Personnel", "Service Income").

value

numeric. The statistical value.

units

character. Units of measurement (e.g., "organizations", "persons", "10,000 yuan").

variables

character. Variable name in coded format.

Source

China Agricultural Machinery Industry Yearbook, China Agricultural Machinery Industry Association

Details

  • The dataset covers agricultural mechanization services from 2010 to the latest available year.

  • Service indicators include organization counts, personnel numbers, investment amounts, and service income.

  • Data structure evolved over time: separate tables from 2010-2013, merged tables from 2014-2017, and fully integrated tables from 2018-2023.

  • Data is in long format for easy analysis and visualization.

Examples

# View the structure of the dataset
str(MachineService)
#> 'data.frame':	8124 obs. of  6 variables:
#>  $ province  : chr  "全国" "北京" "天津" "河北" ...
#>  $ year      : chr  "2023" "2023" "2023" "2023" ...
#>  $ chn_block4: chr  "年末机构数A" "年末机构数A" "年末机构数A" "年末机构数A" ...
#>  $ value     : num  195606 225 214 5533 4625 ...
#>  $ units     : chr  "个" "个" "个" "个" ...
#>  $ variables : chr  "v9_t1_fwzz_jgs" "v9_t1_fwzz_jgs" "v9_t1_fwzz_jgs" "v9_t1_fwzz_jgs" ...
# Filter data for year-end organizations in 2023
MachineService[MachineService$year == "2023", ]
#>     province year       chn_block4       value units        variables
#> 1       全国 2023      年末机构数A   195606.00    个   v9_t1_fwzz_jgs
#> 2       北京 2023      年末机构数A      225.00    个   v9_t1_fwzz_jgs
#> 3       天津 2023      年末机构数A      214.00    个   v9_t1_fwzz_jgs
#> 4       河北 2023      年末机构数A     5533.00    个   v9_t1_fwzz_jgs
#> 5       山西 2023      年末机构数A     4625.00    个   v9_t1_fwzz_jgs
#> 6     内蒙古 2023      年末机构数A     4448.00    个   v9_t1_fwzz_jgs
#> 7       辽宁 2023      年末机构数A     5141.00    个   v9_t1_fwzz_jgs
